introSection: Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Chudo Park in Elektrostal, Moscow, Russia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wacky Worm layout with yellow track and green supports.

fullText:
Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Chudo Park in Elektrostal, Moscow, Russia.

Wacky Worm layout with yellow track and green supports.
